mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM users WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, phone, email, nickname, avatar, gender, status, user_type, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{gender}, #{status}, #{userType}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
